main.description: A third-party or community listing for an app built on or for the AT Protocol.

name.description: The display name of the app.

description.description: A short description of what the app does.

images.description: Visual assets for directories and stores, such as icons, hero images, screenshots, banners, and social cards.

tags.description: Open discovery tags for filtering and search, preferably lowercase. Do not use tags for platforms, lexicon interoperability, or listing language.

status.description: Current release or maintenance status of the app.

profileDid.description: DID expected to publish the canonical app profile at community.lexicon.app.profile/self.

langs.description: Human language of this entry's text. This describes the listing, not the languages supported by the app.

links.description: Relevant destinations for the app. The first link should be the primary destination.

platforms.description: Platforms where this app is available.

lexicons.description: Self-declared AT Protocol lexicon interoperability signals.

accountIndicators.description: Records whose presence in an account can indicate that the account probably uses this app.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this entry was last updated.
